title: Refactor event parser: split giant switch, extract helpers, fix counter collisions
acceptance_criteria: mapAGUIToActivityEvent() (175 lines) split into per-event-type mapper functions using strategy/map pattern
extractFilePath(input) helper created to eliminate 6+ duplicated (event.input?.file_path as string) patterns
mapToolCallStart (180 lines) refactored with lookup table for tool categories
Module-level event counters replaced with UUID-based IDs or instance-scoped per session
